untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit implied volatility (IV) metrics, percentile rank calculations, and IV deviation measured in standard deviations. The allowed indicator set contains only historical volatility (hvol_20), which is backward-looking realized volatility, not forward-looking implied volatility. IV percentile rank and IV standard deviation threshold cannot be computed from available indicators. Used hvol_20 as closest proxy but this is a material semantic difference from the original signal intent.
translation_notes: Substituted hvol_20 for implied volatility as best available alternative. Thresholds are approximate and require calibration. Entry conditions use price_pos_20 as volatility regime confirmation. Original signal requires IV-specific inputs (iv_deviation_threshold_stddev, iv_percentile_threshold) that cannot be replicated with provided indicators.
